changes: Header: CSS transition overlay (opacity+pointer-events), 44px touch targets, body scroll lock
AdminSidebar: animated backdrop, slide transition with duration-300, 44px min-height nav items, body scroll lock, route-change close
PhotoGrid: added overflow-hidden to prevent horizontal scroll at narrow widths
PhotoCard: added minWidth:0 and object-cover for flex shrink safety
Lightbox: touch swipe (50px threshold, horizontal-only), 95vw/85vh image sizing, 44px touch targets, responsive arrow positioning, responsive caption text
